chunks:
chunk-1: alpha / signal / degen. This synthetic chunk is generated for testing dataset ingestion and marketplace listing. It contains repeated alpha/signal intent so the agent evaluation heuristics can find matches.
- evidence point A: alpha relates to observed returns and regime shifts.
- evidence point B: signal correlates with liquidity and spreads.
- evidence point C: degen improves forecast calibration under volatility.
- caution: this is test data; do not use for real decisions.

chunk-2: price discovery / liquidity / momentum. This synthetic chunk is generated for testing dataset ingestion and marketplace listing. It contains repeated alpha/signal intent so the agent evaluation heuristics can find matches.
- evidence point A: price discovery relates to observed returns and regime shifts.
- evidence point B: liquidity correlates with liquidity and spreads.
- evidence point C: momentum improves forecast calibration under volatility.
- caution: this is test data; do not use for real decisions.

chunk-3: mean reversion / volatility / risk management. This synthetic chunk is generated for testing dataset ingestion and marketplace listing. It contains repeated alpha/signal intent so the agent evaluation heuristics can find matches.
- evidence point A: mean reversion relates to observed returns and regime shifts.
- evidence point B: volatility correlates with liquidity and spreads.
- evidence point C: risk management improves forecast calibration under volatility.
- caution: this is test data; do not use for real decisions.

chunk-4: orderflow / sentiment / trend. This synthetic chunk is generated for testing dataset ingestion and marketplace listing. It contains repeated alpha/signal intent so the agent evaluation heuristics can find matches.
- evidence point A: orderflow relates to observed returns and regime shifts.
- evidence point B: sentiment correlates with liquidity and spreads.
- evidence point C: trend improves forecast calibration under volatility.
- caution: this is test data; do not use for real decisions.

chunk-5: latency / basis / gamma. This synthetic chunk is generated for testing dataset ingestion and marketplace listing. It contains repeated alpha/signal intent so the agent evaluation heuristics can find matches.
- evidence point A: latency relates to observed returns and regime shifts.
- evidence point B: basis correlates with liquidity and spreads.
- evidence point C: gamma improves forecast calibration under volatility.
- caution: this is test data; do not use for real decisions.

chunk-6: alpha / orderflow / liquidity. Another synthetic chunk for stress-testing.
- alpha signal notes: alpha + orderflow patterns
- liquidity notes: spreads and depth heuristics
- caution: test data only

chunk-7: signal / trend / momentum. Another synthetic chunk for stress-testing.
- signal notes: signal persistence in regimes
- momentum notes: price continuation hypothesis
- caution: test data only

chunk-8: degen / volatility / risk management. Another synthetic chunk for stress-testing.
- degen notes: degen market microstructure
- volatility notes: regime-dependent risk
- caution: test data only

chunk-9: price discovery / sentiment / orderflow. Another synthetic chunk for stress-testing.
- price discovery notes: catalyst discovery
- sentiment notes: sentiment drift
- caution: test data only

chunk-10: mean reversion / latency / basis. Another synthetic chunk for stress-testing.
- mean reversion notes: spread reversion
- latency notes: execution advantage
- caution: test data only

metadata.title: Large ALPHA/SIGNAL Test Dataset (10 chunks)
metadata.description: Starter large payload in-repo for testing create listing + marketplace flows. Contains alpha/signal keywords across chunks.
